hooks.prompt: Before making this code change, verify alignment with docs/GOAL.md, docs/ROADMAP.md 'Now' milestone, and spec docs (if they exist). For specs, use docs/specs/README.md if it exists, else docs/SPEC.md. If not yet checked in this conversation, read docs/GOAL.md, docs/ROADMAP.md, and the spec docs first and confirm the current task is aligned before proceeding.

SessionStart.description: Inject techlead-workflow skill content as trigger guidance
